instruction: Set the default screenshot image format to {FMT}.
source: cove-original (design 047 §7 Tier-A defaults string com.apple.screencapture type).

args: defaults write com.apple.screencapture type -string {BASELINE}; killall cfprefsd 2>/dev/null || true
defaults write com.apple.screencapture type -string {FMT}; killall cfprefsd 2>/dev/null || true
